Get started

Turning ecommerce

reviews

into growth

opportunities

Consensys is an all-in-one e-commerce review analytics platform to help you learn and optimize your brand performance at any online marketplace.

Get started today

Accessing review data from world's leading e-commerce platforms

Insights at scale

Harness millions of reviews for brand insights

Allow actionable e-commerce insights to spread across your organization.

generate actionable insights

AI & ML transformation

Subject Based Machine Learning Engine

Subject Based Dialogue for Topic Identification
Rating Based AI Engine
Rating based Impact Scores
Each individual review contains over 50 datapoints covering price, promotion, *rating, verbatim text, topics, brand, category, manufacturer, seller, segment, delivery time and many more.
innovative products

The new powerful insights stack

Consensys developed 3 proprietary services with tailored programs and advanced analytics that serve your insight needs — from price, compliance to cross-category trend.

  • insights

    Explorer

    Category specific deep dives to uncover the why and decodes growth strategies and tactics enabling "Drive 5-star".
    Get started

    Featured insights

    • Driving to 5-star review
    • Brand Topic Deep Diving
    • Product Portfolio Analysis

  • Performance

    ShareTrack

    Share tracking across marketplaces that matters to your category growth, covering Brands, Sub-brands, and Segments.
    Get started

    Featured insights

    • Brand Market Share
    • Brand Growth Overview
    • Price - Promotion Analysis

  • optimization

    SellerMap

    See how resellers are representing your brand and actively manage damaging activity with e-com partners.
    Get started

    Featured insights

    • Seller Issues Analysis
    • Seller Comparison
    • Seller Topic Deep Diving
Insights at scale

There are more reviews than you think

Did you know that the Baby Product Category alone on Shopee and Lazada Malaysia has over 1.5 million reviews?

Ecommerce data opens untapped insights

  • Unlock new research capabilities that spread actionable insights across your organization.

  • Category Landscape
    What topics define the category and what is trending.
  • Category Drivers and Drainers  
    What topics drive hi/lo ratings.
  • Share of Topics
    How are your brands performing across topics vs. competition.
  • Brand Drivers and Drainers
    What topics will get your brands and segments to a 5-star rating.
  • Competitive Benchmarking
    Landscape to identify areas of leadership, weakness, and emerging threats.
  • Brand Map
    Where to attack, where to defend, where to innovate and what to drop.
  • Ratings
    Improvement or decline root cause analysis: Portfolio drainers, Phrases and key words/ themes.
  • Consumer Language
    Insights for marketing and coms: clusters of topics, real phrases an more.

Trusted by leading brands and retailers

“Consensys e-com market share data service has helped us illuminate our position for a specific e-com universe across Indonesia.The additional data points provided as part of ShareTrack have been very helpful in our e-com strategy as we look ahead in this growth channel."
Narul Ginting — Digital Business Manager, Shell Indonesia
“Consensys ShareTrack has allowed us to understand and track our market share for our key categories across multiple e-com sites and markets. Finally, an e-com market share provider that is clear and transparent on the data detail behind the number.”
Sagar Phadke — Director, Global Strategic Insights & Analytics, Johnson & Johnson
"Consensys ShareTrack is really a useful tool as part of the overall research picture. Not only are we able to compare our performance against our competitors we can look back many years.”
Nguyen Huu Phuc // Founder and CEO
Read the case study
"Consensys ShareTrack is really a useful tool as part of the overall research picture. Not only are we able to compare our performance against our competitors we can look back many years.”
Nguyen Huu Phuc // Founder and CEO

  • In-depth brand insights
  • Optimization opportunities
  • Brand performance visibility
